metadata.title: ORUS Gallery | Contemporary Art | Taipei — Paris
metadata.description: ORUS Gallery represents international contemporary artists for Asian and global collectors. Origin + Us: where art meets identity.
metadata.aboutDescription: Founded between Paris and Taiwan, ORUS Gallery develops an international selection of contemporary artists. Origin + Us.
metadata.artistsDescription: Discover the artists represented by ORUS Gallery. A curated selection of emerging and established voices between Paris and Taipei.
metadata.pressDescription: Media coverage, articles, and press resources from ORUS Gallery.
metadata.contactDescription: Contact ORUS Gallery for information about artworks, artists, or the gallery program. Taipei — Paris.
metadata.exhibitionsDescription: Current and upcoming exhibitions at ORUS Gallery. Contemporary art between Taipei and Paris.

gallery.title: Selected Works
gallery.subtitle: Works capable of shifting context without losing their essence

curatorial.title: Curatorial Direction
curatorial.text1:
Intimacy as a bridge between cultures
Founded between Paris and Taiwan, ORUS Gallery champions an international roster of artists whose works explore intimacy in all its forms: the body, memory, human relationships, and the personal narratives that shape our identities.
curatorial.text2: The gallery sees intimacy as a universal language, a space where individual experiences become capable of crossing cultural boundaries. Through these sensitive narratives, the works reveal what connects cultures as much as what distinguishes them.
curatorial.text3: By creating dialogues between different art scenes, ORUS builds a program where intimacy becomes a meeting point: a common ground from which works can circulate, respond to one another, and resonate on a global scale.

items.title: A selection, not a programme
items.description:
ORUS works with a deliberately small number of artists.
Each work presented is part of a strong, coherent practice capable of engaging with different cultural contexts.

items.title: Relationship Over Time
items.description: We don't sell artworks, we build collections. Each recommendation is part of a long-term vision, respectful of both the collector's journey and the artist's trajectory.

items.title: Dialogue Between Scenes
items.description:
Based between Paris and Taiwan, ORUS fosters exchanges between different international art scenes.
The gallery acts as a meeting space where works circulate, confront each other, and find new resonances.

cta.title: Get in Touch
cta.text: Want to learn more about an artist or a work? Our team is at your disposal to guide you.

foundation.text:
Founded between Paris and Taiwan, ORUS Gallery develops an international selection of contemporary artists.
Its name, born from the encounter between Origin and Us, expresses a simple intention:
to bring forth works capable of resonating beyond their original context.

vision.title: A Vision
vision.subtitle: Intimacy as a space of relation
vision.text1:
ORUS attends to what does not reveal itself immediately:
the body, memory, bonds, inner narratives.
Intimacy here is not a withdrawal.
It is a space of relation.
vision.text2:
A silent point of passage,
where works can circulate from one context to another,
without losing their rightness.

international.title: An International Presence
international.subtitle: Paris — Taipei
international.text1:
ORUS is engaged in an active dialogue between Europe and Asia.
From Paris, the gallery maintains close relationships with artists, institutions, and key players in the European contemporary scene.
international.text2: In Taiwan, it develops roots within a dynamic artistic ecosystem, characterized by attentive collectors, engaged institutions, and a cultural scene open to international dialogues.
international.text3: This dual presence allows ORUS to circulate works, ideas, and practices between different cultural contexts.

curatorial.title: Curatorial Direction
curatorial.subtitle: A held line
curatorial.text1:
ORUS does not operate by accumulation.
The gallery builds a line.
Each exhibition is part of a precise continuity, where works enter into relation with one another, with their context, and with those that came before.
curatorial.text2:
Coherence is not displayed.
It is built.

collectors.title: Collectors & Institutions
collectors.text:
ORUS develops lasting relationships with an international community of collectors, curators, and institutions.
The gallery favors an approach based on understanding the works and the progressive building of collections, in an attentive dialogue between artists and collectors.

gallery.name: ORUS Gallery
gallery.tagline: Contemporary art gallery between Paris and Taipei.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro1: ORUS Gallery is committed to protecting the privacy and personal data of visitors to its website.
privacy.intro2: This Privacy Policy explains how personal data may be collected, used, stored and protected when using the ORUS Gallery website or contacting the gallery.

section1.title: 1. Data Controller
section1.body:
The data controller is ORUS Gallery.
For any question regarding this Privacy Policy or the processing of personal data, please contact: contact@orusgallery.com

section2.title: 2. Personal Data Collected

section3.title: 3. Purpose of Data Processing

section4.title: 4. Legal Basis

section5.title: 5. Cookies and Analytics
section5.body:
The ORUS Gallery website may use cookies or similar technologies to ensure the proper functioning of the site, improve navigation and analyse website traffic.
Where required by applicable law, users will be informed and asked to provide consent before non-essential cookies are placed on their device.
Users may manage or disable cookies through their browser settings. Disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of the website.

section6.title: 6. Data Retention
section6.body:
Personal data is retained only for as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was collected.
Messages and contact requests may be kept for the duration necessary to manage the relationship with the user, and generally for no longer than three years after the last contact, unless a longer retention period is required by law.

section7.title: 7. Data Sharing
section7.body:
Personal data may be accessed only by authorised persons or service providers acting on behalf of ORUS Gallery, strictly where necessary for the operation of the website, communication, hosting, technical maintenance or email services.
ORUS Gallery does not sell, rent or trade personal data with third parties.

section8.title: 8. International Transfers
section8.body:
As ORUS Gallery operates in an international context, certain technical or communication services may involve the transfer of personal data outside the European Economic Area.
Where such transfers occur, ORUS Gallery takes reasonable steps to ensure that appropriate safeguards are in place in accordance with applicable data protection laws.

section9.title: 9. Data Security
section9.body:
ORUS Gallery takes reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect personal data against unauthorised access, alteration, disclosure, loss or destruction.
However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is completely secure. ORUS Gallery cannot guarantee absolute security.

section10.title: 10. User Rights

section11.title: 11. External Links
section11.body:
The ORUS Gallery website may contain links to external websites or third-party platforms.
ORUS Gallery is not responsible for the privacy practices, content or policies of those external websites.

section12.title: 12. Updates to this Privacy Policy
section12.body:
ORUS Gallery may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in legal, technical or operational requirements.
The latest version will always be available on this page.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro1: By accessing and using the ORUS Gallery website, you agree to the following Terms & Conditions. Please read them carefully before using the site.

section1.title: 1. Purpose of the Website
section1.body:
The ORUS Gallery website is intended to present the gallery, its artists, exhibitions, projects, editorial content and related information.
The website is provided for informational and communication purposes only. Nothing on this website shall be considered as a binding offer, contract, sale agreement or guarantee of availability.
Any request concerning an artwork, exhibition, artist, press material or collaboration must be addressed directly to ORUS Gallery.

section2.title: 2. Intellectual Property
section2.body:
All content displayed on this website, including but not limited to artworks, images, texts, logos, graphic elements, design, layout, videos, documents and visual identity, is protected by intellectual property laws.
Such content is the property of ORUS Gallery, its artists, photographers, authors, partners or respective rights holders.
No content from this website may be copied, reproduced, downloaded, distributed, modified, published, transmitted, displayed, used for commercial purposes or otherwise exploited without prior written authorization from ORUS Gallery or the relevant rights holder.
Any unauthorized use of the content may constitute an infringement of intellectual property rights.

section3.title: 3. Artwork Images and Rights
section3.body:
Images of artworks displayed on the website are provided for presentation and informational purposes only.
The display of an artwork on the ORUS Gallery website does not grant any license, transfer of rights, authorization of reproduction or commercial use.
Any request to reproduce, publish, share or use an image of an artwork must be submitted in writing to ORUS Gallery.

section4.title: 4. Use of the Website

section5.title: 5. Information on Artworks and Availability
section5.body:
ORUS Gallery makes reasonable efforts to ensure that information presented on the website is accurate and up to date.
However, information relating to artworks, including titles, dates, mediums, dimensions, availability, prices, provenance, exhibitions or related details, may change without prior notice.
The presence of an artwork on the website does not guarantee that it is available for sale.
All artwork enquiries, prices, reservations, sales conditions, transport arrangements and related matters are subject to direct confirmation by ORUS Gallery.

section6.title: 6. No Online Sales Contract
section6.body:
Unless expressly stated otherwise, the ORUS Gallery website does not constitute an online sales platform.
Any sale, reservation or acquisition of an artwork is subject to a separate written agreement, invoice or confirmation issued directly by ORUS Gallery.
No transaction shall be considered final until formally confirmed by ORUS Gallery.

section7.title: 7. External Links
section7.body:
The website may contain links to external websites, social media platforms or third-party services.
ORUS Gallery is not responsible for the content, accuracy, availability, privacy practices or policies of external websites.
Accessing third-party websites is done at the user's own risk.

section8.title: 8. Limitation of Liability

section9.title: 9. Privacy and Personal Data
section9.body:
The processing of personal data is governed by the ORUS Gallery Privacy Policy.
Users are invited to consult the Privacy Policy for further information on how personal data may be collected, used, stored and protected.

section10.title: 10. Modification of the Terms
section10.body:
ORUS Gallery may update or modify these Terms & Conditions at any time, in order to reflect changes in the website, legal requirements or gallery operations.
The latest version will always be available on this page.
Continued use of the website after any update constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms & Conditions.

section11.title: 11. Governing Law
section11.body:
These Terms & Conditions are governed by French law, unless otherwise required by mandatory applicable local regulations.
Any dispute relating to the use of the website shall be subject to the competent courts of France, unless otherwise required by applicable law.

section12.title: 12. Contact
section12.body: For any question regarding these Terms & Conditions, please contact: contact@orusgallery.com
